summary: Save a custom fieldset as regular fieldset
description: Save a custom fieldset as regular fieldset. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/offer_templates/{offer_template_id}/fieldsets/save_as_template. Required parameters: title, offer_template_id, company_id. Optional parameters include category.

params.name: title
params.description: Name of the newly created template

fieldset.name: Nothing happens to anybody which he is not fitted by nature to bear.
